title: potentilla × blanda
intro: Potentilla × blanda, also known as the double-flowered potentilla, is a hybrid flowering plant of the family Rosaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective against wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The plant's roots and leaves have been used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, offering benefits such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of potentilla × blanda can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
